currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Infrastructure Engineer at Orbital | Kubernetes · Terraform · GitOps
currentLinkedIn.about: I automate the boring parts of infrastructure so engineers can ship features. Ten years in DevOps — from bare metal to multi-region Kubernetes fleets.

experience.title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Migrated 40-service monolith to Kubernetes across three AWS regions; zero customer-facing downtime
Built GitOps pipeline with ArgoCD that eliminated manual kubectl applies and cut deployment risk by 80%
Reduced cloud spend by $380K/year through right-sizing and Reserved Instance purchasing strategy

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Owned Terraform codebase for 200+ AWS resources; enforced drift detection in CI
Implemented automated certificate rotation that ended all manual TLS renewal incidents
